meta.title: Maintaining U.S. Leadership Amid Shifting Geopolitics: A Conversation with Ambassador Kelly Craft
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Kelly Craft and Hudson Senior Fellow Heather Nauert on the challenges and policy priorities facing the United States as the coronavirus strains geopolitical tensions
